narrative:
Sandusky County has 38,606 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.1% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -7.5% D−R vs -20.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
